summary: Completed dnd-kit cutover for playback queue and libraries with a shared sortable component, persisted library ordering migration, and validated backend/frontend reorder flows.
how_to_test: make migrate-test && cd apps/web && npm run typecheck && npm test -- "src/app/api/playback/playback-routes.test.ts" "src/app/api/libraries/libraries-media-routes.test.ts" "src/__tests__/components/GlobalPlayerFooter.test.tsx" "src/__tests__/components/GlobalPlayerQueue.test.tsx" "src/app/(authenticated)/media/[id]/TranscriptMediaPane.test.tsx" "src/app/(authenticated)/podcasts/podcasts-flows.test.tsx" && cd ../python && DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://postgres:postgres@localhost:54322/nexus_test uv run pytest -q tests/test_playback_queue.py tests/test_libraries.py::TestReorderLibraryMedia tests/test_libraries.py::TestListLibraryMedia::test_list_media_ordering && DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://postgres:postgres@localhost:54322/nexus_test_migrations uv run pytest -q tests/test_migrations.py::TestPlaybackQueueMigration::test_head_contains_playback_queue_table_and_auto_queue_flag tests/test_migrations.py::TestLibraryMediaOrderingMigration::test_head_contains_library_media_position_contract
risks: library page drag interactions do not yet have dedicated frontend component tests; behavior is validated by backend contract tests plus route proxy tests.
internal/non-route library_media writers can temporarily produce sparse positions until normalization paths run.
shared SortableList is currently vertical-only and will need extension for future non-vertical drag surfaces.
